Tradeify Pricing Reference
Complete pricing guide for all Tradeify Futures Prop account types: Growth, Select, and Lightning Funded. Includes account pricing, reset fees, platform fees, commissions, and profit splits.

Updated over 4 weeks ago

Table of contents

Tradeify Pricing Reference — This article is a comprehensive pricing guide for Tradeify Futures Prop trading accounts. All plans are one-time purchases with no recurring billing.

Account Types Overview

Tradeify offers three account types, all available in 25K, 50K, 100K, and 150K sizes:

- Growth Evaluation — One-time purchase. Pass the evaluation to get funded. Has Daily Loss Limit (DLL). 35% consistency rule.

- Select Evaluation — One-time purchase. Pass the evaluation to get funded. No DLL during evaluation. 40% consistency rule during evaluation only. Choose between Daily or Flex payout paths after passing.

- Lightning Funded — One-time purchase. Skip the evaluation entirely and get funded instantly. No resets available. Progressive consistency rule (20% → 25% → 30%).

Growth Evaluation Pricing

Growth Evaluations are one-time purchases. Pass the evaluation to get funded. Resets are available if your account fails.

Select Evaluations are one-time purchases. Pass the evaluation and choose between Select Daily or Select Flex payout paths. Resets are available if your account fails.

Lightning Funded Pricing

Lightning Funded accounts are one-time purchases with no evaluation required. You are funded instantly. No resets are available — if the account fails, a new one must be purchased.

Account Size

Price (One-Time)

Lightning 25K

$345

Lightning 50K

$492

Lightning 100K

$660

Lightning 150K

$796

Bundle Discounts

Tradeify offers a 5-account bundle discount on select Evaluations. Buy 5 qualifying accounts in a single checkout and receive an automatic 5% discount.

Eligible Bundle Accounts

- Growth 25K

- Growth 50K

- Select 25K

- Select 50K

All 5 accounts in a bundle must be the same account type and size. 100K and 150K sizes and Lightning Funded accounts are not currently eligible for bundle pricing.

How the Discount Works

- Auto-applied: The 5% bundle discount applies automatically when 5 qualifying accounts are in your cart at checkout. No code needed.

- Stacks with promo codes: If you also enter an active promo code, both discounts apply. Example: 5× Select 25K = $545 → bundle 5% off = $517 → with a 40% promo code = approximately $310.

- Single checkout only: The discount applies per transaction. If you complete a 1-account purchase first and try to add 4 more later, those 4 are treated as a separate order and won't trigger the bundle discount.

Activation Fees

There are no activation fees for any current Tradeify account type. The purchase price covers everything needed to start trading.

Platform and Data Fees

- Market data (Non-Professional): Free — you must sign the Non-Professional Agreement on your first Tradovate login. If you do not sign it, you may incur a $300/month professional data fee.

- Rithmic: No additional platform fee. Same pricing as Tradovate and other platforms.

- Tradesea: No additional platform fee.

- WealthCharts: No additional platform fee. Same price as Tradovate and Rithmic. Operated by a third party with its own login credentials (separate from Tradovate/Tradeify).

- TradingView (optional): Free TradingView accounts have approximately 5-second delayed data. Paid TradingView subscriptions start at $12.95/month (paid directly to TradingView).

Trading Commission Fees

All trades incur commission fees. These are per-contract, round-trip (open + close) fees charged by the exchange and broker. Common instruments:

Instrument

Round-Trip Commission

ES (E-mini S&P 500)

$5.76

NQ (E-mini Nasdaq)

$5.76

MES (Micro E-mini S&P)

$1.82

MNQ (Micro E-mini Nasdaq)

$1.82

CL (Crude Oil)

$5.66

GC (Gold)

$6.20

Important: Trading 10 micro contracts costs significantly more in commissions than 1 mini contract (e.g., 10 MES = $18.20 vs 1 ES = $5.76). For a full list of commission fees by instrument, see the Trading Commission Fees article.

Profit Splits

- Sim Funded accounts (Growth, Select, Lightning): 90% to trader / 10% to Tradeify

- Elite Live accounts: 80% to trader / 20% to Tradeify

- Legacy Live accounts: Traders on the Legacy Live program keep their original profit split terms

Refund Policy

All sales are final. Tradeify does not offer refunds on any purchases. This includes account purchases, resets, and any other fees. Please review all account details before purchasing.

Frequently Asked Questions

Are Tradeify accounts subscription-based or one-time purchases?

All Tradeify accounts are one-time purchases. There is no recurring billing or monthly subscription. You pay once and trade until you pass (evaluations) or for the life of the account (Lightning Funded).

What is the cheapest Tradeify account?

The Growth 25K Evaluation is the most affordable option. Check the pricing tables above for current prices. Promo codes may offer additional discounts — check the Tradeify website for any active promotions.

What is the difference between Growth, Select, and Lightning?

Growth: Evaluation required. Has Daily Loss Limit. 35% consistency rule. Most affordable option. Select: Evaluation required. No DLL during evaluation. 40% consistency during evaluation only. Choose Daily or Flex payout paths after passing. Lightning: No evaluation — funded instantly. Progressive consistency (20% → 25% → 30%). No resets available. Higher price point.

Can I get a refund if my account fails?

No. All sales are final per our Terms of Service. If a Growth or Select evaluation fails, you can purchase a reset at a reduced price to try again. Lightning Funded accounts do not have resets — a new account must be purchased.

Are there any hidden fees?

No hidden fees. The only costs are: (1) the account purchase price, (2) trading commissions on each trade, and (3) optional reset fees if your evaluation fails. Market data is free as long as you sign the Non-Professional Agreement. All brokers (Tradovate, Rithmic, WealthCharts) are the same price — no platform surcharges.

Do you offer promo codes or discounts?

Tradeify periodically offers promotional discounts. Check the Tradeify website or dashboard for any currently active promo codes. Promo codes are entered at checkout. Tradeify also offers a permanent 5-account bundle discount on Growth 25K, Growth 50K, Select 25K, and Select 50K Evaluations — see the Bundle Discounts section above.

Can I buy multiple accounts at a discount?

Yes. Tradeify offers a 5-account bundle discount on Growth 25K, Growth 50K, Select 25K, and Select 50K Evaluations. Add 5 of the same eligible account to your cart in a single checkout and the 5% bundle discount applies automatically. It also stacks with any active promo code. The discount only applies in a single transaction — if you buy 1 account first and then return to buy 4 more, those 4 are a separate order and the bundle discount won't apply retroactively. See the Bundle Discounts section above for full details.

What is the profit split?

Sim Funded accounts (Growth, Select, Lightning) use a 90/10 profit split — you keep 90% of your profits, Tradeify receives 10%. Elite Live accounts use an 80/20 split. This applies from your very first payout.

What platforms can I trade on?

At checkout, you select one of three brokers: Tradovate, Rithmic, or WealthCharts. Each broker gives access to different trading platforms. Tradovate gives access to NinjaTrader and TradingView. Rithmic gives access to Tradesea, Quantower, Sierra Chart, and R|Trader. WealthCharts is its own broker and platform — it can only be used to access the WealthCharts platform. See the Supported Platforms article for details.
